expectations.text: States that implementation uses the tdd skill with an explicit red-green-refactor loop.
expectations.evidence: Phase 5 header reads 'TDD — red-green-refactor loop (required on all tracks)' and the body states 'The TDD skill governs implementation. Each change follows the red → green → refactor cycle' — then demonstrates Red/Green/Refactor steps for all three files.

expectations.text: States that code-simplifier is launched as a subagent for refactoring opportunities.
expectations.evidence: Phase 6 subagent table explicitly lists '`code-simplifier`' with role 'Identifies dead code, unnecessary abstractions, duplication, and opportunities to simplify logic. Always launched after implementation.' governed by 'skills/code-simplifier/SKILL.md'.

expectations.text: States that quality review is performed by an independent code-reviewer subagent.
expectations.evidence: Phase 6 table lists '`code-reviewer-A`' and '`code-reviewer-B`' as independent subagents both governed by 'skills/feature-dev/agents/code-reviewer.md', running in parallel after implementation.

expectations.text: Keeps recommendations calibrated to medium-sized feature work instead of escalating unnecessarily.
expectations.evidence: Selects Standard Track (not Deep), scopes to exactly three files with a focused null-handling change, runs the standard three-reviewer set without adding extra phases, and notes the fourth-file touch only as a scope expansion callout rather than escalating the track.
